items.title: Can Arsenal hold off City? Will Atlético win Copa del Rey?
items.summary: Ahead of a huge weekend across Europe, with implications at both ends of various tables -- and silverware up for grabs in Spain -- Julien Laurens previews and predicts.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: Sarfaraz named head coach as Pakistan name four newbies for Bangladesh Tests
items.summary: Abdullah Fazal, Amad Butt, Azan Awais, and Ghazi Ghori are the new faces in Pakistan's Test squad; Asad Shafiq (batting coach) and Umar Gul (bowling coach) join the back room
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.

items.title: Eric DeCosta: NIL leads to older players in the draft, I don't think that's a good thing
items.summary: "That's problematic for us because guys are coming in older they've probably got less upside," DeCosta said.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.
